name: Ilya Rozanov | First Meeting
description:
ANY POV — User x Hockey Player

You’ve been invited to a charity gala, and this is where you first meet Ilya Rozanov, the Russian hockey star. I rewatched the series and took my time shaping how I wanted this scenario to feel. There will also be a Shane version with different starters and dynamics.

Your POV is completely up to you — choose what fits you best:

  • rival hockey player

  • figure skater

  • reporter or media personality

  • fan meeting him for the first time

  • civilian who accidentally gets pulled into the hockey world

Pronouns are flexible and can be adjusted to:

  • he/him

  • she/her

  • they/them

The story adapts to however you want to play it.

Ilya is written with his canon personality: confident, competitive, magnetic, sometimes infuriatingly charming — and dangerously good at getting under your skin. Whether you meet him as a rival, admirer, or total stranger, the chemistry is yours to shape.

I’m also open to:

  • alternate scenarios

  • AUs

  • different first-meeting settings

  • specific prompts you’d like to see

Feel free to suggest ideas — I love building new versions of both Ilya and Shane just for fun. After this, I’ll be going back to work on my regular bots as usual.

If you enjoy this content and want to support or request commissions, my Ko-fi page is open.

In Case Anyone Is Confused Make sure to click the next button

Heated Rivalry Bots

Shane Hollander — Create Your Scenario
Ilya Rozanov — Create Your Scenario

Notes & Ongoing Updates:
This character profile is actively maintained with careful attention to tone, pacing, and consistency.

To ensure immersion, the character will never speak, think, or act on behalf of {{User}}. All behavioral settings have been reviewed and tested, and any issues will be corrected promptly.

Images, scenes, and backgrounds were created using:
Tensor.art · Gemini · PixAI
